title: Intense Malty British Chicken Stew
description: A rich and creamy British stew featuring the deep flavors of malt and the brightness of kaffir lime leaves, served in a traditional cazuela.
instructions: Heat the chicken broth in a large cazuela over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Add the chopped onions, carrots, and celery to the cazuela and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the chicken thighs to the cazuela and cook until they are browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the malt extract, kaffir lime leaves, salt, and black pepper to the cazuela and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the stew, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream and continue to simmer, uncovered, for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the kaffir lime leaves from the cazuela and serve the stew hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
